race.comment: UP THE FRONT (10) just over a year between runs when he wound up strongly from back in the field with a respectable second over 1000m at Kembla Grange in a BM64 race. Looks up to this with the tidy second-up record. WAVE BREAKER (1) saves her best for this track and trip and races best with the runs spaced. Swooped late for a soft victory over 1100m at Dubbo in this class. Can carry the extra weight and win again. HELLCIBELL (2) back to her preferred trip after ploughing through the heavy going with a fighting second over 1300m at this track. Shapes as a leading contender. ENTERPRISE LEGEND (4) performed above expectations when resuming with a narrow third over 1000m at Gunnedah in fast time. No shock to see him win this with the 4kg claim.
